title: Mirrored Tinted Glass
description: Makes tinted glass act like a mirror in any LabPBR supported shaderpack. Works best with packs that implement world space reflections.
body: This pack replicates the functionality recently introduced into Complementary Shaders which makes tinted glass act like a mirror. It requires a shaderpack that supports LabPBR, and works best in packs that have world space reflections.
